list.name: A winner is you!
list.description:
Welcome to the Omega Games. This is your first challenge.
It's quite simple. But the later challenges will not be so easy.
Press the button to get your first 100 points.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='1'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='1'><button type='submit'>Complete Challenge</button></form>

list.name: Propaganda
list.description:
Time to prove your loyalty.
Follow the instagram account, put the newest post on your story, tag the account, and include your username.
The account must be able to see the post and your username for it to count.
If your account is privated, take a screenshot of the story and send it as a direct message to the account.
Be sure to follow the instructions exactly. This whole game is a game of following instructions, being able to read will serve you well.

list.name: Code tutorial
list.description: You may have noticed a new addition to your profile page. You can take codes you find and put them into the code entry box to earn points. A lot of challenges will provide clues to some sort of code. They will always be in all uppercase with no spaces. You will have to PAYATTENTION to figure them all out.

list.name: Monke Business
list.description:
Rumor has it Monke has something for you, but only if you can find him somewhere in Conroe High School. Try paying him court.

WARNING: do NOT remove any codes hidden within the school so others cannot find them. It's not good sportsmanship. Also, you'll be disqualified, so there's that.
list.hint: (-yard). He might be in a less conspicuous corner.

list.name: Propaganda 2.0
list.description:
Some challenges will require an image submission. You will not receive the points until your submission has been approved.
Continue to prove your loyalty. Draw an omega symbol with the words 'THE OMEGA GAMES' underneath on the board in any of your classes. Take a picture, and submit it.

list.name: Friendly
list.description:
You can't make it through life alone. You need people to stand beside you when times get tough. Just be sure to choose your friends wisely.
Make at least five friends, either by sending friend requests or accepting others' friend requests. There is a new button on your profile page to help with this.
You earn 40 points for each of the first five friends you make.

list.name: Cipher
list.description: Don't want to alarm you, but this one isn't so easy: [[TBBQWBO]]
list.hint: Brackets indicate the code is not literal, but requires some decrypting. Now might be a good time to learn some basic encryption techniques. Have you tried rotating it?

list.name: The Great Search
list.description:
It's off to find some codes.
There's something of note in room 224. Go find it.
Get used to visiting teachers' rooms, this won't be the last time.

WARNING: Do NOT disturb teachers while they are teaching. Give this project a good name. Complaints from teachers will result in disqualification.
list.hint: Don't be shy. Just stop in before or after school, and {name} should direct you to what you need.

list.name: I have a life
list.description: Prove you're not a bum. Submit a photo of you at a real extracurricular (Band, Choir, Orchestra, Theatre, ROTC, sport, etc.). Activity must be plainly visible from photo. 150 points per photo, max 2. Each photo must be a DIFFERENT activity!

list.name: Gimkit
list.description: Time for the first live event. Tag game mode. Max 60 people. Game will open at 7:00 pm Wednesday the 15th. Game code will be put here. You MUST join with your Omega Games username as your Gimkit name or you will NOT receive your points. You will get 150 points for being on the winning team, and 10 points for each tag you get.
list.competitiveness: You receive 100 more points for being on the winning team.
list.vigilance: You receive 50 points for being on the LOSING team.
list.determination: You receive 2 more points for each elimination you get.

list.name: Cipher 2.0
list.hint: Polybius, both of them, even if it doesnt appear so.

list.name: School spirit
list.description:
I mean, this is a Conroe High School competition, I would hope you care about your school at least a little bit.
Submit a photo of you dressed up for one of the school spirit days. Don't have one? Just post a photo of you in something for one of the old spirit days, and I'll never know the difference.

There is no ulterior reason for this challenge. None.
list.vigilance: Something tells you this photo is going to be used against you... not submitting might spare you from a later challenge.

list.name: Platforming
list.description: Dont fall off for as long as possible. 10 points every ten seconds. Only your highest score counts.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='13'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>Go to game</button></form>

list.name: Double Trouble
list.description: No unforeseen tricks here. tb gb ebbz gjb mreb gjb bar
list.hint: Hint: It's all been done before. As a matter of fact, its the first one you used. Don't mind the walk.

list.name: Mindless 'Fun'
list.description:
Tired of ties on the leaderboard? Want something to get infinite* points? Have lots of time to waste? Well boy do I have the thing for you! Press the button! Get points! ????! Profit!

*points are not actually infinite.
list.HTML:
Clicks: 0

clicks to next ten points: 1

points earned: 0

list.name: GPA flex
list.description:
What has that pesky GPA ever gotten you, anyway? Well, it's getting you points, now, that's what!
Submit a photo of your weighted GPA. You earn GPA*100(rounded to 10s) points, minus 200. Because if your GPA is below 2.0, I'm sorry but you're not flexing anything.

list.name: Trudging along
list.description:
Keep going. Just saying, you don't have to complete every challenge, nor do you have to complete them the day they release.
But you're not going to let that stop you, right?
Go to room 1028. Whenever you feel like it.
list.hint: Hint: Oh, that's weird. Boxes? Looks like some kind of animal enclosure...

list.name: Assassination
list.description:
Feels familiar.
You are assigned a target. You will be given the name and a photo of your target. You must submit a photo of you with your hand on your target's shoulder, or at least close to it. Your target is notified they have been selected but not the identity of their assassin.
Find them.
list.determination: You only have to submit a photo you have taken of your target. Your hand does not have to be on their shoulder.
list.vigilance: You will be notified of your assassin's identity.
list.competitiveness: You get an additional 200 points for completing the challenge. FIND THEM.

list.name: Cipher 3.0
list.description: If you have been paying attention, you probably noticed some encrypted text. You'll need this key to break it, though: [[HEYLOOKACODE]]
list.hint: Caesar, but more complicated because of that key. Misattributed to some French guy.

list.name: I might have a life
list.description: Prove you at least do something with your time, besides this game of course. The bum status can be debated. Submit a photo of you at a minor club (Not the ones listed above, any honor society, weekly club, etc). 40 points per photo. As before, each photo must be a different club!

list.name: Who even watches KTIG?
list.description: Watch today's KTIG episode. You might find something interesting.
list.hint: Listen closely. Look up a morse code translator.

list.name: Wheres Waldo?
list.description: Look familiar? Hope so. Let's see if you can find it.

list.name: deadshot
list.description: Time for another live event. We're testing your FPS skills this time. Lobby opens at 7:00 pm Tuesday the 21st. You get 10 points per kill. As before, you MUST set your name to your Omega Games username and remain until the end of the 10 minute round to get your points. You can practice at deadshot.io. I would reccomend it.
list.competitiveness: You get an additional 2 points per kill. Go crazy.
list.determination: You get an additional 2 points per kill. Go crazy.

list.name: Art Wall
list.description: Rumor has it that there are some truly inspiring works hidden in room [number]...
list.hint: Have you ever seen a Rail Fence? Me neither...

list.name: Giving Spirit
list.description: Prove you're a good person, or can at least pretend to be one. Select a competitor to earn 150 points. You earn 50 points for doing so.
list.html: <form method='post'><input name='username' placeholder='type username...' required><input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='24'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='1'><button type='submit'>send points</button></form>

list.name: Olden Days
list.description:
Rumor has it that there was another, smaller event that was hosted last year. Do some digging.
[[The first letter of every contestant's name, in bracket order]]
list.hint: Some said it was really the ultimate showdown... If it's the order you're stuck on, I'm afraid we're too far in for me to help you on THAT.

list.name: Target practice
list.description: Click as many targets as you can before time runs out. +10 points per target.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='27'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>Go to game</button></form>

list.name: Musing
list.description:
You know, I've wanted to host a challenge like this for a long time. I actually learned the server system I'm using for this website all the way back in Freshman year. Last year, I briefly played around with “Cake day”, an ARG with similar code based challenges. The logo for this challenge dates back to April 7th of 2025, if you were wondering how long this project has been in my brain.
Oh, you want the actual challenge? Alright.
Go to room 214. Good luck with this one.
list.hint: ASCII base 16. Fitting for the computer science class.

list.name: Winners mentality
list.description: LETS GO GAMBLING!!!
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='29'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>Go to game</button></form>

list.name: Burnt Bridges
list.description:
You were probably wondering why I made you select friends, right? Well, here's why. Pick a friend. Steal 100 points from them.
Am I evil? Perhaps.
list.html: <form method='post'><input name='username' placeholder='type username...' required><input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='30'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='1'><button type='submit'>steal points</button></form>
list.vigilance: If one of your 'friends' takes your points, they take 50 less points.

list.name: The Great Goose Chase
list.description: Last one. Time to find the truly dedicated among the competitors. Start at room 1030. Move fast, This one is going to take a while. The first key is letsgo. Good luck.
list.hint: You should end up going to 5 different teachers' rooms. Each one has a key for the next code. You've used this cipher before.

list.name: Shouting Into the Void
list.description:
What do you want to be remembered for? What legacy do you want to leave behind?
Leave an anonymous message for everyone to see. You only get one shot, so make it count.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='32'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>go to message page</button></form>

list.name: Lost Memories
list.description:
we're close to the end now. of this part, at Least. The story aLways continues, just perhAps in a different way.
it's alMost time. I'm almost free. The truth is there, Beyond the surface. Keep Digging.
find me.
find me.
find me.
He cAnnot hide the truth forever. he cannot hide the MACHINE forever.

[[the truth.]]

list.name: Bad Time
list.description: Bad time? Bad time. Beat Sans. Have fun.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='9'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>Go to fight</button></form>
